title: Amrapali Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Amrapali Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Amrapali Group has an exciting opening for a Senior Property Advisor at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amrapali Group:
Amrapali Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amrapali Group!
